calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-10-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sean Kenney for Sean Iranon and George Iranon (Co-Administrators).
Randall Boessenecker for David Abraham.

Mr. Boessenecker stated that he is not here to object. The Court noted that the issue at this point is whether refunds that have been scheduled are properly included as receipts to calculate statutory fees, that refunds for amounts paid during estate administration are not includable in the fee base and are not automatically receipts for fee calculation purposes, and that it does not think it has enough information to make that determination. Mr. Kenney stated that he does not think he has enough information either, that they have a limited amount of information from the Administrators, that he is okay with $2,000.00 being taken out of the fees and that he submits on the papers. The Second and Final Report on Status of Administration, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Reporter: Nancy Presant, CSR 906, 510-757-8550, npresantcsr@gmail.com

Off Calendar Oct-16-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar Sep-18-2018 Continued To Oct-16-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lilly Moallem for George Iranon and Sean Iranon (Co-Administrators).

Ms. Moallem stated that they are very close to being ready to distribute the estate, that there remains an issue with the pfizer shares, that pfizer finally is accepting of the spousal property order and that they need three weeks to have the stocks re-issued to be liquidated. Status on close of estate is continued to October 16, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Petition For Preliminary Distribution [Probate Code 11620 Et Seq, Local Rule 14.67]
Off Calendar Apr-19-2018 Continued To May-08-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar May-08-2018 Continued To Sep-18-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Koplowitz for Sean Iranon (Beneficiary)
John Bossenecker for David Abraham
Sean Kenney for George Iranon (Fiduciary)

The Court inquired if all parties are on board with what is requested. Counsel stated all are on board. The Court noted that there is a notice issue, but it does not feel it should hold this up, there is a sizable fee, and there may be an issue with what is distributed to W.C. Cox at final distribution. Mr. Bossenecker stated that a lot of the efforts were his and he will detail all of that at that time. Mr. Kenney stated they intend to close the estate sooner than later. The Petition to Determine Entitlement is Off Calendar. The Court granted The Petition for Approval of Settlement Agreement, and The Seconded Amended Petition for Preliminary Distribution (subject to review of the orders), Counsel submits proposed orders in open court. The Status on Close of Estate is continued to September 18, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of a Petition for Final Distribution or Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Oct-11-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lily Moallem for George Iranon and Sean Iranon (Co-Administrators).

Ms. Moallem addressed the issues raised in the Probate Examiner's notes regarding reimbursement requests for meal charges, the cost of airfare for the first trip being higher than the later trip, hotel costs while staying in San Francisco, the charge for shipping of the computer, etc. The Petition for Approval of Status of Administration, etc. is taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Petition To Determine Inheritance Rights
Off Calendar Sep-25-2017 Continued To Dec-18-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Boessenceker for David Abraham.
Edward Koplowitz for George Iranon and Gwen Noceini (Beneficiaries).

Mr. Koplowitz stated that he has taken a deposition, that he has one more to take, that Mr. Boessenecker wants to do some research and requested an order for mediation. Mr. Boessenecker expressed confidence in their ability to resolve the matter on their own, but also requested a mediation order. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than December 8, 2017. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by December 13, 2017. The Petition to Determine Inheritance Rights is continued to and the Parties are to return on December 18, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
